name: portable-skills-pack
description: Portable, reusable SKILL.md files for use across agent extensions (Claude, OpenCode, etc.)

skills.name: ck:template-skill
skills.description: Starter template for new portable skills

skills.name: ck:skill-development
skills.description: Guide to create high-quality, discoverable, reusable SKILL.md files

instructions: Copy any skill folder into your agent's skills directory (e.g. .claude/skills/ or .opencode/skills/). The SKILL.md frontmatter enables discovery and validation by other tools.
